user.title: Add a Fleetlight zone
user.description: A zone is an ordered set of lights that effects run across. Pick an Area for a quick default order, or pick lights individually (in the order effects should flow through them) to override it.

data.name: Zone name
data.light_entity_ids: Lights, in order (optional, overrides Area order)

error.no_lights: Choose an Area or at least one light.

abort.already_configured: A zone with this name is already configured.

start_effect.name: Start effect
start_effect.description: Start a Fleetlight effect on a zone, optionally tuning its parameters.

effect.name: Effect
effect.description: Name of the built-in effect to run.

stop_effect.name: Stop effect
stop_effect.description: Stop whatever effect is currently running on a zone.
